subject: [PATCH v2 7/7] mm: switch deferred split shrinker to list_lru

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: Identified a double-put bug in fuse_try_move_page() where the folio refcount drops to zero prematurely. Suggested adding an extra folio_get() before replace_page_cache_folio() to maintain the reference.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series addresses an issue in the deferred split shrinker, which handles cgroups suboptimally by using a per-NUMA node or per-cgroup queue instead of the intersection. The shrinker bit adds an imperfect guard rail, causing large pages to be split prematurely. The patch converts the deferred split queue to use list_lru, which properly sets up per-node, per-cgroup lists and streamlines list operations.
